name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Reupload

𝑴𝒂𝒎𝒂'𝒔 𝑫𝒂𝒚 || "Aren't I the best husband, mama?"

Waking up next to your husband and child, you are surprised by the best Mother's Day gift.

☆°▪︎¤•

Originally published for Mother's Day.

I've had this idea for a while, but only realised now that it would be perfect for mother's day 🥹

I've made this completely full of fluff (also because there is a child in here. I know there are sick people out there unfortunately 😮‍💨)

Your son is named Satoshi. I really like the thought that Satoru fought tooth and nail just to convince you to name the kid after him 😭 egotistical mf (affectionate).

Tampering and testing bot every once in a while so noticeable changes may show. Lmk if there are any problems :))

I use JLLM to test the bot so it might be better to use as well.
